# Procura West

> Your fractional procurement department for oil & gas and construction companies in Western Canada. Fractional CPO services, Procurement Health Check, and outsourced procurement consulting.

## About

Procura West is a supply chain management consulting firm based in Calgary, Alberta. Founded by Amy-Marie Holland, a procurement professional with over 13 years of experience in Western Canada's oil & gas and construction industries.

We serve companies that need dedicated procurement expertise but don't want — or need — a full-time hire. We combine deep industry knowledge with AI-powered tools to deliver the analytical horsepower of a large procurement team at a fraction of the cost.

## Services

- Fractional CPO / Fractional Procurement Department: Outsourced procurement leadership
- Free Procurement Health Check: We review your current setup and show you where the gaps are
- Services Procurement: End-to-end contractor sourcing and management
- Contract Management: Time & materials administration, rate auditing, PO reconciliation
- Vendor Evaluation: Supplier qualification, performance tracking, risk assessment
- Spend Analysis: AI-driven spend categorization, trend identification, cost reduction
- RFP/RFQ Management: Bid package development, evaluation, and award
- Compliance Tracking: COR, ISN, WCB, Avetta, ISNetworld, ComplyWorks management
- Invoice Validation: Invoice review, duplicate detection, dispute resolution
- Sub-Contractor Management: Onboarding, prequalification, performance KPIs

## Target Industries

- Oil & Gas (upstream, midstream, oilfield services)
- Construction (general contractors, ICI builders, industrial constructors)

## Target Clients

- CEOs, Presidents, CFOs, VPs of Operations, Project Management Directors
- Companies with 50–500 employees and $20M–$500M revenue without in-house procurement
- Companies in Western Canada, primarily Alberta

## Engagement Model

- Monthly consulting packages (Foundation from $2,500/mo, Operations from $5,500/mo, Enterprise from $10,000/mo)
- No long-term contracts
- Predictable monthly costs
- Free Procurement Health Check as entry point
- Ad-hoc project work also available

## Contact

- Website: https://procurawest.ca
- Email: info@procurawest.ca
- Phone: +1-403-519-9044
- Location: Calgary, Alberta, Canada
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/115504147

## Key Differentiators

- 13+ years of direct industry experience in oil & gas and construction procurement
- AI-powered analysis tools for spend analysis, contract review, and vendor evaluation
- Not a staffing agency, not a software company — a hands-on procurement partner
- Deep knowledge of Western Canadian oil & gas and construction markets
- Specialist in services procurement, materials procurement, and T&M contracts
